Original: Both armies are nearly wiped out!
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: There are two distinct and independently-run Roman Empires. Both are quite strong in the early going, and picking a fight with them is very dangerous. In time you'll grow much stronger and the Romans weaker, but for now it's probably best to stay on their good side.[BLANK-LINE]Your [ultimate goal|WINNING] in AtG is to defeat the Romans by capturing the [Capital City|CAPITAL] of either half of the Empire, or take the empire over from within by becoming Magister Militum.
Translation: 世界上有两个彼此独立运作的罗马帝国。它们在前期都相当强大，贸然与其开战十分危险。随着时间推移，你会更强而罗马会更弱；但眼下最好还是与他们保持良好关系。[BLANK-LINE]你在 AtG 中的[ultimate goal|WINNING]，是攻占帝国任一半部的[Capital City|CAPITAL]来击败罗马，或成为军务长官，从内部接管帝国。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: Factions are the different kinds of tribes, kingdoms, and empires to be found throughout the world.[BLANK-LINE]Different Factions all start in different situations, and are at different level of advancement, except for the human player, who always starts with a single [SETTLEMENT] and 3 [Clans|CLAN].[BLANK-LINE]You start the game only able to play as the Goths, but more can be unlocked by conquering the [Capital|CAPITAL] of another Faction, or forming an [Alliance|ALLIANCE] with it.[BLANK-LINE]Special, non-playable Factions include the [Romans|ROME], the [Bandits|BANDIT], and [Neutral|NEUTRAL] minor tribes.
Translation: 派系代表世界各地不同的部族、王国和帝国。[BLANK-LINE]不同派系开局形势和发展水平各不相同；人类玩家例外，总是以一个[SETTLEMENT]和3个[Clans|CLAN]开局。[BLANK-LINE]游戏开始时你只能扮演哥特人，但可以通过征服其他派系的[Capital|CAPITAL]，或与其结成[Alliance|ALLIANCE]来解锁更多派系。[BLANK-LINE]特殊的非可玩派系包括[Romans|ROME]、[Bandits|BANDIT]和[Neutral|NEUTRAL]小部族。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: When the game starts you have a bit of information about your surroundings in the form of 'Rumors'. These can help shape your early strategy before you've had a chance to explore more directly.
Translation: 游戏开始时，你会以“传闻”的形式获得周边环境的一些信息。它们能在你直接探索之前，帮助你制定早期策略。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] increase in Level within a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] based on how much [XP|XP] they have.[BLANK-LINE]As long as a Clan remains in a Profession within the same Discipline it will continue gaining Levels, but switching to a Profession in a different Discipline will reset that Clan back to Level 0.[BLANK-LINE]Upon reaching Level 10 a Clan can acquire 1 [Upgrade|UPGRADE] for free (the Upgrade must still first have been [Studied|LEARN]).[BLANK-LINE][Learning|LEARN] the initial Discipline [Tech|TECH] for each branch of the Tech Tree allows you to pick one of your Clans to give 2 free Levels in that Discipline, giving you a head start on [Training|TRAIN] them in associated [Professions|PROFESSION].
Translation: [Clans|CLAN]在[Discipline|DISCIPLINE]中的等级取决于拥有的[XP|XP]。[BLANK-LINE]只要氏族留在同一纪律下的职业中，就会继续提升等级；若切换到其他纪律的职业，该氏族会重置为0级。[BLANK-LINE]达到10级后，氏族可以免费获得1项[Upgrade|UPGRADE]（该升级仍必须先被[Studied|LEARN]）。[BLANK-LINE][Learning|LEARN]科技树各分支的初始纪律[Tech|TECH]后，可选择一个氏族，使其在该纪律中获得2个免费等级，帮助其更快开始相关[Professions|PROFESSION]的[Training|TRAIN]。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] gain 1 Experience Point (or XP) in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] each turn they spend in a [Profession|PROFESSION] belonging to that Discipline. Upon reaching the required amount of XP a Clan will [Level Up|LEVEL]. This threshold increases with each Level.
Translation: [Clans|CLAN]每在所属[Discipline|DISCIPLINE]的[Profession|PROFESSION]中度过一回合，便获得1点经验值（XP）。达到所需XP后，氏族会[Level Up|LEVEL]。该门槛会随等级提高。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] become the Resident of a [Structure|STRUCTURE] after they finish [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] it, or when they join it as an [Apprentice|APPRENTICE].
Translation: [Clans|CLAN]在完成[Constructing|CONSTRUCT][Structure|STRUCTURE]后会成为其驻留者，或作为[Apprentice|APPRENTICE]加入时成为驻留者。
Note: 2026-07-04 NeedsTrial non-Game batch; exact catalog value.

Original: [HOTKEY:F2] If a [Caravan|CARAVAN] is paying a visit this button will take you to a screen where you can trade [Resources|RESOURCE] you don't need for those you do.[HOTKEY:F2]
Translation: [HOTKEY:F2] 若有[Caravan|CARAVAN]来访，此按钮会带你进入交易界面，用不需要的[Resources|RESOURCE]换取需要的资源。[HOTKEY:F2]
